title: Senior Software Engineer - Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services family as a Senior Software Engineer in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services:
Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services!
